typeDescription.1month: Final reminder to prevent missed applications

4months.title: Time to prepare for your visa renewal
4months.body: The application period for {{name}} is approaching. Check your required documents.

3months.title: Visa renewal document preparation
3months.body: 3 months until expiration. Please check the status of your required documents.

1month.title: 1 month until visa expiration
1month.body: If you haven't applied yet, please complete the procedure as soon as possible.

2weeks.title: [URGENT] 2 weeks until visa expiration
2weeks.body: Please complete the renewal procedure immediately.

4months.title: Your visa renewal application period has started
4months.body: {{days}} days remaining until your {{type}} expires. Please start preparing the required documents.

3months.title: Continue your visa renewal preparations
3months.body: {{days}} days remaining until expiration. Please check your required documents.

1month.title: Your visa expiration is approaching
1month.body: {{days}} days remaining until expiration. We recommend applying soon.

2weeks.title: Final visa renewal reminder
2weeks.body: 14 days remaining until expiration. If you haven't applied yet, please complete the procedure immediately.

test.title: Test Notification
test.body: This is a test notification. The notification feature is working correctly.
